formats.name: Standard
formats.metaNotes: July 2026 Standard (Marvel Super Heroes era). Ranked from MTGGoldfish meta % + recent Challenge/League results. Cross-check ladder trends on Untapped.gg. Eight full lists below — open any rank for the complete deck.

formats.name: Alchemy
formats.metaNotes: Alchemy shifts with balance patches — eight shells covering ladder and event play.

formats.name: Historic
formats.metaNotes: Historic rewards collection depth; eight decks from control to combo.

formats.name: Pioneer
formats.metaNotes: Arena Pioneer tracks paper/RCQ results — eight competitive shells.

formats.name: Timeless
formats.metaNotes: High power. Eight lists spanning combo, fair midrange, and control.

formats.name: Brawl
formats.metaNotes: Eight commander-led Brawl lists for the open queue.

formats.name: Standard Brawl
formats.metaNotes: Eight Standard-legal Brawl commanders and shells.
